THIS WEEK’S BIG IDEA: GROWING THINGS. We will plant seeds, notice changes outside and make a tiny garden for our classroom window.

Today’s gentle rhythm

8:30 AM
Welcome & free play
Choose a centre, greet a friend and settle in.
9:15 AM
Circle time
Songs, a story and our question of the day.
10:20 AM
Outdoor play
Explore, climb, ride and notice the weather.
1:15 PM
Make & imagine
Seed art, building and small-group play.

At home, you can…

Ask“What did you notice outside today?”
PackSpare clothes, water bottle and labelled rain boots.
PracticeLet your child open their own snack when possible.
